name: Doll House
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>形</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>家</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いえ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can target 1 Normal Monster in your GY with 0 ATK or DEF, or, if you control "Princess Cologne", you can target 2 such monsters instead; Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck with the same name as each target, as a Level 6 DARK monster. You can only use this effect of "Doll House" once per turn. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can attach 1 "Grandpa Demetto" you control to "Princess Cologne" you control as material, then end the Battle Phase.
eff: You can target 1 Normal Monster in your GY with 0 ATK or DEF, or, if you control "Princess Cologne", you can target 2 such monsters instead; Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck with the same name as each target, as a Level 6 DARK monster. You can only use this effect of "Doll House" once per turn. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can attach 1 "Grandpa Demetto" you control to "Princess Cologne" you control as material, then end the Battle Phase.

action: Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
